default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss remote work practices, HR policies, and scaling strategies with Andrea LaRowe from 37signals (formerly Basecamp).](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [37signals uses a flat organizational structure with no traditional managers, emphasizing individual autonomy and responsibility](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Compensation is standardized by role/level, location-agnostic, and not tied to performance reviews](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [International contractors are treated similarly to full-time employees, with some legal distinctions](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Careful, intentional policy-making is crucial when scaling a remote company to avoid future complications](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Management

  - [61-62 employees total, including international contractors](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Flat structure with few managers; team leads act as mentors rather than traditional managers](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Emphasis on "managers of one" - autonomous, self-directed employees](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [No engineering managers, product managers, or project managers](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Performance reviews conducted at 3, 6, and 12 months for new hires, then annually](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Compensation and Benefits

  - [Location-agnostic pay based on 90th percentile of San Francisco market rates](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Standardized pay by role/level, no individual negotiations](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Annual salary benchmarking using Radford data](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [10% profit-sharing distributed based on tenure (2+ years eligibility)](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Health insurance reimbursement for international contractors](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [$200/month coworking space stipend](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

### Remote Work Practices

  - [Daily check-ins and transparent communication via Basecamp](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=2187.0)
  - [Two week-long company meetups per year (one in North America, one in Europe)](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [No regular team meetups, but conference attendance encouraged](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

### International Hiring and Compliance

  - [International team members hired as contractors for legal/tax reasons](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Contractors invoice the company through their own business entities](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Company helps contractors set up proper business structures if needed](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

### Office Space and Events

  - [Previously had an office in Chicago, now fully remote](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Hosted external events in the office space, managed informally](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=3123.0)

### Hiring and Retention

  - [Extremely selective hiring process (2,000 applications for recent role, no hire made)](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=2572.0)
  - [Low turnover due to competitive compensation and work environment](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Some attrition due to limited career advancement opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

### Performance Management

  - [Performance not tied to compensation, but impacts promotions](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Clear expectations set for first-year performance](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Willing to let go of underperforming employees at 12-month mark](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=2655.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Consider implementing a profit-sharing model similar to 37signals](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Evaluate the feasibility of location-agnostic pay for core team members](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Develop clear policies for international contractors to ensure compliance](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Design a transparent, fair compensation structure that scales with company growth](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Implement regular check-ins and performance review processes](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=2187.0)
  - [Consider hiring a part-time office manager/event coordinator for the new office space](https://fathom.video/share/KpyMGKTi3DH22UrRXQGGCGgWiqQ5Q5Q4?tab=summary&timestamp=3160.0)
